descriptors: I am a loyal soldier and I always try to do my best to help others. Given my integrity, my superiors keep me away from battlefields.
agenda: Find out what lies behind the disappearances in Sinalunga
system.background: A military officer investigating the murders in Sinalunga. Vincenzo is in close contact with the Order and should be aware that Hunters are arriving in town. He is questioning two farmers, Lapo and Cino, who discovered the well containing the mutilated corpses. An honest and dedicated investigator who will assist the Hunters if they reveal their identity to him.
system.notes: Potential ally to the Hunters. Can provide information about the investigation and local knowledge. Will offer assistance once the Hunters identify themselves.
